member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetFallingReactionHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the SetFallingReactionHelper for sending a SetFallingReaction
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the SetFallingReaction
to.
member.remarks: Sets the type of reaction if catchFall is called.
